overall.description: A samurai warrior stands on a rock in a rural Japanese village at night, illuminated by warm firelight. The camera slowly orbits around the stationary character, revealing traditional wooden farmhouses and dense forest surroundings. This is high-quality game engine footage from an open-world action game.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village clearing at night with traditional farmhouses

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands motionless on a rock in a rural village at night, surrounded by traditional wooden farmhouses and dense forest. The camera slowly orbits around the character in a clockwise direction, revealing the warm glow of campfires illuminating the thatched-roof buildings and casting long shadows across the grass. The environment is quiet and empty, with no other characters or movement besides the gentle camera rotation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous clockwise orbit around a stationary samurai, gradually revealing the quiet layout of a rural Japanese village at night. It begins with the warrior standing motionless on a rock, framed against a backdrop of dense forest and traditional wooden farmhouses. As the camera rotates, the perspective shifts to uncover the warm glow of campfires that illuminate the thatched roofs and cast long, flickering shadows across the grass. The scene then expands to show the stillness of the empty environment, maintaining a steady circular motion that emphasizes the isolation of the character within the dimly lit settlement.
